sub_mechanisms: M_1: finite-dim estimate of (dim ker - dim coker) for the loss-gradient operator
M_2: characteristic-class-style estimate from Hessian eigenstructure
M_3: index-preserving regularizer term added to fine-tune loss
M_4: critical-point class label tracking during training
stripped_llm_application: During fine-tuning, periodically compute a finite-dimensional invariant from the loss-gradient operator (difference between dimensions of two subspaces); estimate a corresponding topological-style invariant from Hessian eigenstructure; add a regularizer that penalizes updates which would change this invariant class; track the critical-point class as a training signal.
novelty_claim_stripped: Sharpness-aware (SAM, Sophia) and Hessian-trace regularizers target scalar curvature; this candidate uses a topological-invariant-class regularizer over the parameter manifold, preserving the topology of the critical-point set rather than its sharpness.
